title: SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C Project
tagline: Build a mini application using SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C
description: Create a working SQL & Databases application demonstrating SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C.
starterCode:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
solution:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C

ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 4C in SQL & Databases.
